steps.title: Find the central contradiction
steps.content: The passage states a myth—”people thought tool use was unique to primates”—and immediately refutes it: “Dolphins and other animals... have busted the myth.” This contradiction is the passage's core.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content: The passage argues that a variety of animals use tools, not just primates. Choices A and C incorrectly focus on intelligence, which the passage never addresses; choice B wrongly centers on humans when they aren't discussed. That matches choice D — D is correct.
